testsuite.name: TestCases._6_CheckoutCompletePageTest

testcase.name: verifyCheckoutCompleteLbel2Test
testcase.system-out: Checkout Page3 Label :- Thank you for your order!

testcase.name: verifyCheckoutCompleteLabel3Test
testcase.system-out: Checkout Page3 Label :-Your order has been dispatched, and will arrive just as fast as the pony can get there!

testsuite.system-out: Checkout Page3 Label :-Your order has been dispatched, and will arrive just as fast as the pony can get there! Checkout Page3 Label :- Thank you for your order! Checkout Page3 Label :- Checkout: Complete! URL of checkout :- https://www.saucedemo.com/checkout-complete.html Cart Page Label :-Your Cart URL of Cart page :-https://www.saucedemo.com/cart.html URL of checkout page 2:-https://www.saucedemo.com/checkout-step-two.html Checkout Page Label :-Checkout: Your Information URL of checkout page :- https://www.saucedemo.com/checkout-step-one.html Origional URL of application:- https://www.saucedemo.com/ Title of application:- Swag Labs visibility of login_logo :- true Current URL of application :- https://www.saucedemo.com/inventory.html Count of Product after removing :- 4 Visibility of fb logo :- true Label Title :- Products Visibility of Linkedin Logo :-true Visibility of Twitter logo :- true
